title: Create Aeronautics
description: Build anything from airships to planes and cars!
body: # About Create Aeronautics expands on the systems of Create to enable players to build all types of vehicles and physics contraptions using Sable. It features content and blocks for building anything from planes, drones, and hot-air balloons, to cars, trucks, and whimsical gizmos. It contains 3 "sections" of content: - **Simulated** is the core of the project. It provides assembly, redstone components, and all tools necessary for interacting with simulated contraptions. - **Aeronautics** enables all manner of flying contraptions with hot air, propellers, and magic floating rocks. - **Offroad** allows you to put almost anything that looks like a wheel to use in making land vehicles. # Dependencies ## ❗You must have both Sable and Create installed to play Create Aeronautics. ❗ - https://modrinth.com/mod/create - https://modrinth.com/mod/sable ## ⚠️ Known Incompatibilities - Aeronautics currently has visual issues when used with **Iris Shaders.** ## Credits **Team:** Eriksonn · RyanHCode · Starlotte · KyanBirb · Kryppers · keyberries · BeeIsYou · Cyvack **Contributors:** AddyBerry · Ocelot · LlamaMann · FallenReaper · Farcr · ModogTheDev · Cake **Trailer contributors:** Rhyguy1 · NonaWax · SpottyTheTurtle · Silved · Chazbomb1 · Exeros · maybe_madeline · TropheusJay · FusionFlux · Talrey _Special thanks to FortressNebula, Oakli, Lyzantra, and Amo_
